figures.caption: Table 1. Number of phenomena (out of 13) passing each falsification criterion (total) and with significant Wilcoxon test (sig/total); (p < α, Bonferroni-corrected α = 0.00025 based on the total number of layers); F1: Causal effect on violations, F2: Stability of non-violations; F3: Preferential effect on violations. Combinations require all criteria to hold simultaneously in the same layer.

Table 2. Per-phenomenon ablation results at best layer l∗ (GPT-2, top-k = 15), re-evaluated using layer-wise selection by number of passed criteria. * denotes statistical significance under a Wilcoxon test (p < α), with Bonferroni-corrected threshold α = 0.00025 based on the total number of layers.
